name: Curry Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bell pepper, chopped or sliced
2 cups Red pepper, chopped or sliced
2 teaspoons Curry powder, more or less to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a covered baking dish.
2. Cover tightly with foil or plastic wrap.
3. Cook in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 45 minutes.
